comment.body:
set a buy order at the support, say 10 pts stop-loss,
gets stoped,
next support lower, 
another trade, 10pts stop-loss 
gots stopped out
last pivot,
10 pts stop-loss, 
market reverses, 
momentum confirms, i scale in.
20 pts back, i lock it, i'm at breakeven.
i let the rest running, with setting the sell order even higher.
green trade
